items: Small personal item baggage (e.g. handbag or backpack under the seat) now has a clear label, so travelers know what they can bring on board for free.
Fare display now supports very high ticket prices without errors or truncation.
The price calendar can now show two separate one-way fares, making it easier to plan the best combination for a round trip.
Fixed a bug that could incorrectly exclude valid connecting airports from flight search results.
Approval emails now show the currency of the amount, so approvers no longer need to check reservation details separately.
Hotel approval emails now include the booking note, giving approvers immediate context.
Agencies and corporate customers can now generate MIR (Management Information Reports) directly via API, enabling reporting automation.
Fixed an intermittent payment failure on GoGlobal hotel bookings.
Fixed a bug that could create duplicate passive reservations.
Mobile app updated to version 3.7.0 with bug fixes and security improvements.
Strengthened session security for agency logins.
Destination search is now more accurate, with better suggestions while typing.
Travelers can now choose which passport they're traveling with directly in the booking form.
Hotel search is now available within HTML package bookings.
Stripe is now available as a payment option for travelers and agencies.
TripServices reservations are now automatically queued for processing, reducing manual errors and speeding up bookings.
New Help Portal prototype launched — full-screen layout
Persistent sidebar navigation with expandable topics
App switcher: Admin Console, TCP, My Travelport, GOL IBE Web
Contact Help form (Zendesk) added
Baseline information architecture established
Content organised: Getting Started, Configuration, Operations, Troubleshooting
